Container.Name: plex-dupefinder
Container.Overview:
Find and remove duplicate media files in your Plex libraries using Sonarr and Radarr quality scoring.
Features: - Scans Plex for duplicate TV episodes and movies - Scores each file using Sonarr/Radarr quality weights, custom formats, and grab history - Groups duplicates by show with per-show waste totals - Separates same-folder dupes (safe to clean) from different-folder dupes (review carefully) - Bulk select and delete inferior copies from the UI - Sort by name, size, or number of duplicates
Configure your Plex, Sonarr, and Radarr connections in the Settings page after install.
Container.DonateText: If you like my work, please consider a donation!
Container.Description: Find and remove duplicate media files using Plex detection and Sonarr/Radarr quality scoring.

Config.Name: Appdata
Config.Description: Path for config files (API keys, settings)
